name: Alabama Plumbers and Gas Fitters Examining Board Licensee Search

agency.name: Alabama Plumbers and Gas Fitters Examining Board

termsReviewNotes: The linked vendor privacy policy is not a grant of record-reuse rights; redistribution remains unknown.
updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official lookup before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Alabama apprentice, journeyman, and master plumber and gas fitter credentials
Registered plumbing and gas-fitting businesses exposed by the board's lookup
knownExclusions: HVAC and refrigeration credentials are regulated by the Alabama HACR Board and tracked separately.
Private onsite wastewater systems, local permits, and municipal registrations are outside this source entry.
The public lookup requires a verification code and is not approved for automation.
rateLimitNotes: Manual use only. Do not bypass or automate the public verification-code control.
publicRecordsNotes: Official plumbing and gas-fitting lookup metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a credential or authorization does not exist.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed; individual and business searches are verification-code protected.
researchNotes: The board requires companies performing plumbing or gas fitting to register and designate a principal master. Its public portal supports individual and business lookup but presents a verification code.
maintainerNotes: Keep this as a manual handoff. The verification-code control must not be bypassed.

researchEvidence.note: The official board page defines plumbing and gas-fitting credential levels and requires companies performing either trade to register with a principal master.
The official linked lookup exposes individual and business searches, license types and statuses, and a verification-code image.

blocker.summary: The official public lookup requires a verification code; OpenTrade will not bypass or automate that technical control.
